_securityHooks_note: Project security hooks -- generated 2026-05-12 -- shared with the SAP team. Mirrors the user-level baseline (secret files, dangerous bash/PowerShell, git protections, post-write secret scan) plus two project-specific rules: (1) reads/edits of public/frontend-config.json are blocked because it is gitignored and contains the backend URL -- use ./frontend-config.json at the repo root instead; (2) npm run generate-graphql-types is blocked when a literal token is passed as a positional argument -- pass via env var ($GRAPHQL_TOKEN / $env:GRAPHQL_TOKEN) so the secret stays out of shell history and Claude transcripts. Hook scripts live in .claude/hooks/*.mjs (committed) and run on Node 20+, which every team member already has via the project's engines requirement. Escape hatches: (1) ask Claude in-turn to allow a specific operation; (2) run the command in a separate terminal outside Claude Code; (3) add a narrower allow rule in your local .claude/settings.local.json (gitignored).
